title: What Is My Work For?
description: Explore the deeper meaning behind our daily work — beyond paychecks and promotions.
descriptionZh: 探索日常工作背后更深层的意义——超越薪水和晋升。
questions: If money weren't an issue, what kind of work would you do? Why?
What does a 'good day at work' look like for you? What makes it good?
How do you decide what's worth working hard for?
Have you ever felt that your work has a purpose beyond your career goals?
questionsZh: 如果钱不是问题，你会做什么工作？为什么？
对你来说，「美好的工作日」是什么样的？是什么让它美好？
你如何决定什么值得为之努力？
你是否曾经感觉你的工作有超越职业目标的意义？

title: Who Am I Beyond My Achievements?
description: In a culture that values output, how do we find worth beyond what we produce?
descriptionZh: 在重视产出的文化中，我们如何在我们创造的东西之外找到价值？
questions: When someone asks 'who are you?', what's the first thing you think of? Job title? School? Hometown?
Have you ever felt like your value depends on your performance? How did that feel?
What would it mean if your worth was given, not earned?
Who in your life values you for who you are, not what you do?
questionsZh: 当有人问「你是谁？」时，你首先想到什么？职位？学校？家乡？
你有没有觉得你的价值取决于你的表现？那是什么感觉？
如果你的价值是被给予的而不是挣来的，这意味着什么？
你生命中谁是因为你这个人而重视你，而不是因为你做了什么？

title: Living Between Two Worlds
description: You're not fully 'Chinese' anymore and not fully 'American' either. How do we embrace this in-between identity?
descriptionZh: 你不再完全是「中国人」，也不完全是「美国人」。我们如何拥抱这个中间的身份？
questions: What parts of Chinese culture feel different to you now that you've lived abroad?
What parts of American culture do you miss? What parts are you glad to leave behind?
Do you feel like you fully belong in either place? How do you handle that?
Could being 'in between' actually be a gift rather than a burden?
questionsZh: 在国外生活后，中国文化的哪些部分现在让你感觉不同了？
你怀念美国文化的哪些部分？哪些部分你很高兴离开？
你觉得你完全属于这两个地方中的任何一个吗？你怎么处理这种感觉？
「在中间」实际上可能是一种礼物而不是负担吗？

title: What Am I Meant to Do?
description: Beyond career success, how do we discover what we're truly meant to contribute to the world?
descriptionZh: 超越职业成功，我们如何发现我们真正应该为这个世界贡献什么？
questions: What breaks your heart about the world around you?
What unique experiences or skills do you have that could help others?
If you could change one thing about your community, what would it be?
What would it look like to live a life of purpose, not just success?
questionsZh: 这个世界的什么让你心碎？
你有什么独特的经历或技能可以帮助他人？
如果你可以改变你社区的一件事，那会是什么？
过一个有目的而不仅仅是成功的生活会是什么样子？
